diff --git a/src/api/routes.py b/src/api/routes.py
@@ -118,6 +118,14 @@ def list_orders():
+@app.route('/orders/<int:order_id>/refund', methods=['POST'])
+def refund_order(order_id):
+    order = Order.get(order_id)
+    if not order.can_refund():
+        return jsonify({'error': 'not refundable'}), 400
+    order.refund()
+    return jsonify({'status': 'refunded'}), 200

criteria.topic_hint: new POST endpoint to refund an order

diff --git a/src/parser.py b/src/parser.py
@@ -22,15 +22,12 @@ def parse(text):
-    tokens = []
-    for word in text.split():
-        if word.startswith('@'):
-            tokens.append(('mention', word[1:]))
-        elif word.startswith('#'):
-            tokens.append(('tag', word[1:]))
-        else:
-            tokens.append(('word', word))
-    return tokens
+    rules = {'@': 'mention', '#': 'tag'}
+    return [
+        (rules.get(w[0], 'word'), w[1:] if w[0] in rules else w)
+        for w in text.split()
+    ]

criteria.topic_hint: rewrite token-prefix parser using a rules dict

@@ -8,3 +8,9 @@ def test_format_eur():

+    assert format_currency(1500, 'JPY') == '¥1,500'
